goal: Review the third-round community-module fixes against the previously reported findings and identify any remaining bugs, regressions, incomplete implementations, or misleading completion claims so the user can continue directing another AI precisely.
constraints: Do not modify runtime code in this task; this is a review-only task.
Focus on the updated community-module files, App integration, and MainMenu integration.
Verify fixes against the actual code rather than the other AI's summary.
Present concrete findings with file references and prioritize behavioral correctness over compile/lint status.
deliverables: A concise code-review report with prioritized findings and actionable follow-up items.
